title: Your First High Holidays as a Jew: What to Expect
title_zh: 作为犹太人的第一个赎罪日:期待什么
title_he: ימי הנוראים הראשונים שלך כיהודי: מה לצפות
author: Torah Light Team
summary_en: A comprehensive guide for new Jews experiencing their first High Holidays, covering Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur traditions, expectations, emotional landscapes, and practical tips. Includes Chinese cultural parallels and advice for navigating the intensive spiritual experience.
summary_zh: 为新犹太人首次体验赎罪日的全面指南,涵盖犹太新年和赎罪日传统、期望、情感景观和实用技巧。包括中国文化平行和驾驭密集精神体验的建议。
summary_he: מדריך מקיף ליהודים חדשים החווים את ימי הנוראים הראשונים שלהם, המכסה מסורות ראש השנה ויום כיפורים, ציפיות, נופים רגשיים וטיפים מעשיים. כולל הקבלות תרבותיות סיניות ועצות לניווט החוויה הרוחנית האינטנסיבית.
target_audience: Converts and new Jews experiencing their first Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur
cultural_parallels: Lunar New Year vs Rosh Hashanah fresh beginnings
Confucian self-cultivation vs Jewish cheshbon hanefesh
Chinese ancestor veneration vs Yizkor memorial prayers
Maintaining harmony (和) vs seeking forgiveness before Yom Kippur
key_concepts: Aseret Yemei Teshuvah (Ten Days of Repentance)

bibliography.title: Rosh Hashanah Yom Kippur Survival Kit
bibliography.author: Shimon Apisdorf

bibliography.title: The High Holy Days: A Commentary on the Prayerbook
bibliography.author: Rabbi Joseph H. Hertz
bibliography.description: Detailed commentary on High Holiday prayers

bibliography.title: Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur Resources
bibliography.description: Extensive guides and articles on the High Holidays

seo_description: Your first High Holidays as a Jew: Complete guide to Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur for new Jews and converts. Learn what to expect, traditions, prayers, and practical tips for navigating these holy days.
